condition:
Begin with the main base as a rounded, arc-based solid footprint bounded by length 0.742363 and width 0.535615, with height 0.094385 and main extrusion depth 0.0944 from the base datum. Keep the base footprint flush to the reference bounds with left, right, front, and back offsets all 0, and include the base-plane circular void centered at left offset 0.1583 and front offset 0.3113 with radius 0.053. Add the upper annular cylindrical collar on the same axis; its circular profile has outer radius 0.0966 and inner radius 0.0748, spans 0.1932 by 0.1932, and is located with offsets left 0.0617, right 0.4875, front 0.2147, and back 0.1277. This added collar is hollow, rises 0.1452 above the base top, and reaches 0.2396 from the base datum rather than being a solid disk.

Cut the coaxial stepped bore/recess below the collar as circular removed material only, not as a rectangular pocket. Use the same axis at left offset 0.1583 and front offset 0.3113, with circular removed profiles of radius 0.0748 and radius 0.053; the main recessed band runs from 0.0218 to 0.0944 above the base underside with cut depth 0.0726 and a circular face envelope of 0.1496 by 0.1496. Treat the deeper post or bore continuation as contained inside the shallower annular collar footprint: it starts 0.0944 below the base underside and reaches 0.0218 below the base underside, with own depth 0.0726, so the internal opening remains stepped and hollow through these levels.

Add two small shallow circular side recesses near the front side of the base. The first has a circular profile centered at left offset 0.4487 and front offset 0.0472 with radius 0.0073, a footprint of 0.0073 by 0.0146, and offsets left 0.4487, right 0.2864, front 0.0399, and back 0.4811; place its vertical band from 0.0399 to 0.0545 above the base underside and cut it to depth 0.0073. The second matching side recess is centered at left offset 0.5939 and front offset 0.0472 with radius 0.0073, a footprint of 0.0073 by 0.0146, and offsets left 0.5866, right 0.1485, front 0.0399, and back 0.4811; give it the same vertical band from 0.0399 to 0.0545 and the same depth 0.0073.

On the underside, form a separate pattern of four shallow circular removed profiles, each radius 0.0221, without filling the rectangular envelope between them. Locate their axes by offsets from the left and front edges as follows: 0.0526 and 0.3108, 0.3248 and 0.4519, 0.3248 and 0.1717, and 0.7137 and 0.3112. These underside circular recesses occupy the vertical range from 0 to 0.0152 above the base underside and have main cut depth 0.0152; their overall circular-pattern envelope is 0.7053 by 0.3244 but should remain four separate round cuts.
